name: MEGAJUMP
short_description: Only some will reach the top. Will you be one of them? in this precision 3D platformer where every jump is a risk and easy to learn-hard to master controls you will certainly feel rewarded once you start climbing from the Pit of Despair. Just don't fall. FREE NOW
detailed_description:
What was once the most expensive game on steam by a mile is now free.

Story

Escape the Pit of Despair. Jump by jump you stray closer to G̶̡̟͈͎̳͕̬̝͕̹͈̣̎̑̽̾̓̌̈́O̸͙͓͙̪͍̮̲͇̲͙̾̀̓͆̓̓̋̕͝ͅD̴̡̨̛̟̼͍̯̦̹̰̟̜̩̑͑͑̑̈́.
Reach G̶̡̟͈͎̳͕̬̝͕̹͈̣̎̑̽̾̓̌̈́O̸͙͓͙̪͍̮̲͇̲͙̾̀̓͆̓̓̋̕͝ͅD̴̡̨̛̟̼͍̯̦̹̰̟̜̩̑͑͑̑̈́ and À̵̡͖̝͎̖̻̤̻̜͇̘̫̈̓̈́͑̀̏́̍͑̾̇̎̕ͅŞ̸̦͍̣͑͆̃̎͝C̶̢̥̦̞̆̔Ḛ̸͔͇̩̞̗͍̈́̽̇̃̿̆̌̓͆̋͆͘͝N̷̡̧̰̞̫͙͕̟̙̝͔̞͕̰̈́̎̈͐̔̀̋̏̂̈́͑̕D̴̦̦̪̰̲͗͌͑̔̋̒̎̒͑̎̄̂̚̚. You will face many challenges along the way and meet a lot of new friends, And if you fall, just remember this. Just jump up, Just jump up.

Mechanics

In this precision 3D platformer you will fall a lot, but its important to remember that you just need to jump up. Every jump is a carefully through out Mega Jump which needs to be planned out according to the height and length needed for the Mega Jump.



The longer you charge your jump, the higher you go but you also go shorter.



Same for the opposite, charge for less and you go further but lower.

Will you Megajump to the top? or will you mega jump and fail. Megafall
